frb_structural.note: Dispersion Measure: total observed DM, no foreground subtraction. Raw field from CHIME/FRB Catalog 1. DM < 10 excluded at promotion (Milky Way foreground). Predicted structural register 21/pi.

frb_kinematic.note: Inter-burst arrival time in seconds. Repeaters only, within activity windows. Predicted kinematic primary 16/pi. Pre-registration DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.20370708.
